figures.caption: Figure 1. Overview of our Smoke-GS method for hazy image restoration and 3D reconstruction. The pipeline begins with a hazy image that is enhanced using Nano Banana Pro. The enhanced image, along with the dehazed image and camera parameters, is used to generate the Smoke Medium Module. This module encodes pixel ray directions through the Smoke-GS Encoder, which feeds into a Smoke Medium MLP to predict medium parameters. These medium terms are fused with the 3D Gaussian rendering to produce the final output image.
Table 1. Results on the Track 2 final leaderboard. PSNR and SSIM are reported for novel view synthesis under smoke-degraded scenes.
